summary: Made surgical continuity edits by clarifying the Sunday-dinner entry, restoring the Gabe/Eli speakerphone-grace joke that chapter 4 recalls, and reinforcing the apartment heat/fan image at the exit so the next chapter picks up on an established beat.
edits: Reframed the opening paragraph to anchor the chapter at Sunday dinner and avoid repeating a neighboring time-led opening scaffold.
Inserted Gabe's dead-Irishmen grace joke and Eli's answer so chapter 4's callback now lands on an on-page exchange.
Added Lena's clicking window fan to the final apartment beat to smooth the handoff into chapter 4's heat-soaked opening.
